## Testing

- [ ] Manual smoke test: `npm start` → generate blueprint works
- [ ] URL research still scrapes correctly
- [ ] Design reference selector populates and fetches
- [ ] No console errors in browser DevTools

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style (minimal, functional)
- [ ] No new dependencies added (unless absolutely necessary)
- [ ] Backwards compatible or documented breaking change
- [ ] README.md updated with new behavior
- [ ] No sensitive data (keys, credentials) committed
- [ ] Self-review completed
